description_long: This is a classic bentwood chair, often referred to as a Thonet-style chair, featuring a rounded, continuous backrest and a circular seat. The frame is constructed from slender, curved wooden rods, giving it an elegant and lightweight appearance. The seat is flat and plain, made from the same wood as the frame, and is supported by four slightly splayed legs for stability. The backrest is formed by two gracefully arched wooden loops, providing ergonomic support and a distinctive visual profile. There are no armrests, and the overall design is minimalistic yet sturdy, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings. The wood has a natural, matte finish, highlighting the grain and texture of the material.
description: A classic bentwood chair with a rounded backrest, circular wooden seat, and four slender legs, finished in natural wood tones.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the double-arched backrest and the curvature of the wooden frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuous curve of the backrest and the seat's flat profile.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the open, rounded backrest and the circular seat.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the elegant curve of the backrest and the splayed legs.
